ErrorBoundary.title: This page hit an unexpected error
ErrorBoundary.description: The failure was isolated to this view. Try again first, and reload the page if it keeps happening.

NotFoundPage.title: The page you requested does not exist
NotFoundPage.description: The link may be outdated, or the page may have been moved or removed. Return to the main workspace entry and continue from there.

ForbiddenPage.title: This account cannot access the current page
ForbiddenPage.description: The requested address is outside the pages allowed for the current role. Return to the main entry and continue from the correct workspace.

common.draftNotice: This policy page is a practical template draft for the current management system. It should be reviewed by the business owner or legal counsel before being treated as final legal advice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: This policy explains how the current management system handles account, identity, media and workspace data during registration, sign-in, review and role-based work.

sections.title: Information We Collect
items: When you register or sign in, we may process your name, phone number, email address, password authentication record, invitation code, role, city and basic profile status.
When you complete identity or profile steps, we may process ID card numbers, passport numbers, personal photos, personal videos, review status, and the handling notes needed for those steps.
When you use the workspace, we may process role, team, referral, order, task, review and commission data that is necessary to display the pages available to your account.

sections.title: How We Use Information
items: We use account data to create and protect your account, keep you signed in, help you recover access, and bring you to the right workspace so you do not open pages that are not meant for you.
We use identity and media data to support verification, review queues, profile display and the operational decisions made by authorized reviewers.
We keep the necessary business history so orders, tasks, referrals, teams, exchange rates, commissions, and reviews can all be checked later when needed.

sections.title: Access and Sharing
items: Your information is visible only to the roles and team members who need it for account management, verification, review, order processing or related business operations.
We do not sell personal information. Data may be securely stored and processed by third-party cloud service providers.
If access is required by law, security investigation or dispute handling, we may provide the minimum information necessary to satisfy that requirement.

sections.title: Storage and Security
items: The system checks your sign-in status and which pages you can open, helping reduce the chance of workspace information being seen by the wrong people.
Identity and media submissions are kept only for related business steps such as review, display, and later correction. Retention should follow the business retention rules confirmed by the operator.
No web system can guarantee absolute security, but we use reasonable measures to protect your account and related information.

sections.title: Your Choices
items: You can update the profile information that is editable in the system, change your password through the account flow, and switch the interface language between Chinese and English.
For identity, media or account records that cannot be edited directly, contact the system administrator to request correction, review or deletion according to business rules.
If you stop using the system, contact the administrator for account handling. Some operational records may need to be retained for audit, order or compliance purposes.

sections.title: Updates and Contact
items: We may update this policy when the product, information handling methods, legal requirements, or business operations change.
Questions about this policy, account data or privacy requests should be sent to the system administrator through the normal business support channel.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: These terms describe the basic rules for accessing and using the current management system, including accounts, role permissions, submitted materials, and everyday business processes.

sections.title: Service Scope
items: The current management system provides different workspaces for different roles, covering registration, sign-in, profile management, reviews, orders, tasks, referrals, teams, exchange rates, and commission-related work.
The features available to you depend on your assigned role, team relationship, account status, and the functions currently opened to that role.
The system may change, expand or remove features as business operations evolve.

sections.title: Accounts and Access
items: Registration may require a valid invitation code. You are responsible for providing accurate account information and keeping your password confidential.
You may only access the pages and records made available to your role. Attempting to bypass permissions, impersonate another user or inspect data outside your assigned scope is prohibited.
If you suspect unauthorized access, password exposure or incorrect role assignment, contact the system administrator promptly.

sections.title: User Responsibilities
items: You must use the system for legitimate business purposes and follow the operating rules set by the system owner.
You must not upload false, illegal, infringing, harmful or irrelevant materials, including identity documents, photos, videos, task attachments or order information.
You must not interfere with system stability, attempt unauthorized scraping, abuse invitations, submit misleading review requests or disrupt other users' work.

sections.title: Submitted Materials and Reviews
items: Identity information, media files, task deliverables and other submitted materials may be reviewed by authorized personnel before they are accepted or displayed.
A review decision may approve, reject, or require correction of submitted materials. The system may keep review history so it can be checked later when needed.
You are responsible for ensuring that submitted materials are accurate, authorized, and suitable for the related business purpose.

sections.title: Availability and Changes
items: We work to keep the service available, but access may be interrupted by maintenance, cloud service issues, network conditions, security events or product changes.
The operator may adjust business processes, access rules, information items, review rules, or page displays when needed for security, compliance, or business operations.
Important changes should be communicated through the normal business support or administration channel when practical.

sections.title: Suspension and Termination
items: Access may be limited, suspended or terminated if an account violates these terms, creates security risk, submits misleading materials or is no longer authorized for the business role.
After access ends, some records may remain in the system when needed for order tracking, audit, dispute handling, security or compliance.

sections.title: Contact
items: Questions about these terms, account status, permissions or submitted materials should be directed to the system administrator through the normal business support channel.

AdminSectionPlaceholder.badge: This page will continue adding useful content for different roles.

orders.title: Wholesale Orders
orders.description: Manage wholesale customer orders, purchase cost, shipping, fees, gross profit, order month, and related 1688 purchase orders.

order-claims.title: Order Claims
order-claims.description: Receive 1688 purchase orders from files or automatic syncs so sales staff can claim them and assign them to the right customer. Original order data stays protected from casual edits.

logistics.title: Logistics
logistics.description: Track international order numbers, destination order numbers, freight forwarder progress, and logistics costs so each customer can review daily shipment status.

people.title: People Management
people.description: Manage wholesale customer profiles and the sales or promoter accounts that can handle wholesale work in one place.

referrals.title: Wholesale Referral Tree
referrals.description: Show wholesale customer referral relationships and summarize customer referral commission.

commission.title: Wholesale Commission
commission.description: Summarize wholesale customer referral commission separately from tourism business commission.

incentives.title: Wholesale Incentives
incentives.description: Calculate sales incentives from wholesale order profit and order amount separately from tourism order commission.

recruiter.title: Recruiter Workspace

salesman.title: Sales Workspace
salesman.description: This page is still being completed. The sales workspace entry is ready, and detailed content will be added here later.

promoter.title: Promoter Workspace

announcements.title: Announcement Management
announcements.description: Maintain system announcements for clients, internal members, or every role.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: This area will handle order browsing, filtering, status flow, and exception handling. It will later be split into role-specific views for administrators, sales, finance, and clients.

referrals.title: Referral Tree
referrals.description: This section shows the referral relationships visible to the current role, including who referred you and whom you referred. Different roles only see the relationships they are allowed to view.

team.title: Team Management
team.description: This section will cover team members, status metrics, and organizational collaboration details, with role-specific actions added over time.

people.title: People Management
people.description: This area shows the people or customer records available to the current account. Referral relationships and team membership remain in their own sections.

commission.title: Commission Center
commission.description: This section will combine commission rules, settlement details, payout progress, and exception records, and will later evolve into role-specific views for finance and sales.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.description: Manage tourism settings, wholesale settings, and exchange rate settings in one place.

tasks.title: Task Board
tasks.description: This section will bring together todos, reminders, owners, and progress milestones to help each role follow business tasks continuously.

reviews.title: Review Center
reviews.description: This section will handle document review, identity verification, risk checks, and approval flows. It can later branch into role-specific review views for operators, managers, and clients.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Administrators can review problems and improvement ideas submitted by every role, then update the handling status.

serviceFees.title: Service Fee Settings
serviceFees.description: Retail service fees are managed as fixed tiers. Service orders have no service fee; their prices and discounts are managed below.

retail.title: Retail Service Fee Settings
retail.description: Retail orders match the customer's retail-order status: new customers use the new-customer tier for three months from their first retail order; customers with an active Retail/Service VIP use the VIP tier; other returning customers use the standard tier.

wholesale.title: Wholesale Service Fee
wholesale.description: Wholesale fees are not maintained in tourism order service-fee settings. They are handled separately inside wholesale orders.

service.title: Service Order Fee Settings
service.description: Service orders use this fee when saved. After adjustment, the order list and details show service fees with the new rate.

serviceFees.emptyDescription: No service fee tiers are available yet.

validation.invalid: Enter a valid service fee rate.
validation.range: The service fee rate must be greater than 0 and no more than 100%.

errors.duplicate: This service fee rate already exists.
errors.inUse: This service fee rate is used by existing orders and cannot be deleted.
errors.permission: The current account cannot change service fees.
errors.unknown: Service fee save failed. Please try again later.

serviceOrders.title: Service Prices and Discounts
serviceOrders.description: Service orders are saved from fixed USD prices and do not have service fees. Service order discounts are available only to customers with an active Retail/Service VIP.

prices.title: Service Prices
prices.description: These prices set the service order amount and default cost amount. Orders fill them from the selected price, cost, and discount.

discounts.title: Service Order Discounts
discounts.description: Standard customers are saved at the 100% price. Retail/Service VIP customers can use service order discounts.

validation.price: Enter a USD price greater than 0.
validation.cost: Enter a cost amount of 0 or more.
validation.discount: Enter a discount greater than 0 and up to 100%.

errors.unknown: Service order settings could not be saved. Please try again later.

basic.title: Order Basics
basic.description: Fill status, type, amount, rates, and people in the same reading order as order details.

placeholders.transactionRate: Calculated automatically from the exchange rate value
placeholders.rmbAmount: Calculated from amount and exchange rate
placeholders.costAmount: Enter the internal cost, or leave blank

hints.autoRmbAmount: RMB total is calculated from total amount and exchange rate value and cannot be edited.
hints.lockedOrderEntryUser: Orders created from this page are automatically assigned to the current salesperson.
hints.autoDailyExchangeRate: The exchange rate value is filled automatically and cannot be edited.
hints.lockedCurrencyAndRates: The currency and exchange rates stay fixed after the order is created.
hints.serviceAmountLocked: Service order amount is filled from the selected service price and discount.
hints.serviceFeeLocked: Service fee tiers are managed by administrators. The default tier is used here.
hints.autoServiceFee: The service fee is matched automatically from the order type and system settings. It cannot be selected here.
hints.autoTimestamps: After creation, the system writes the created time automatically. After editing, the system updates the latest modified time automatically.

errors.exchangeRateMissing: The selected currency does not have an exchange rate yet. Add it in System Settings first.
errors.invalidForeignKeys: Select a valid order owner, customer, order type, and matching purchase or service options.
errors.cannotCreate: You do not have permission to create this order.
errors.cannotUpdate: You do not have permission to update this order.
errors.updatedScopeNotAllowed: The updated order scope is outside your allowed range.
errors.cannotDelete: You do not have permission to delete this order.
errors.inactiveOrderNumber: Only enabled accounts can create new order numbers.
errors.orderNotFound: The order could not be found.
errors.serviceAmountInvalid: Service orders must be saved from the configured USD price and discount.
errors.serviceDiscountRequiresVip: The customer needs an active Retail/Service VIP to use a service order discount.
errors.vipAmountInvalid: VIP recharge orders must be saved as 200 USD.

purchaseSection.title: Retail Details
purchaseSection.createDescription: This order type needs purchase details. Add rows, then enter the category name on the left and the matching content on the right.
purchaseSection.editDescription: Update purchase details by entering the category name on the left and the matching content on the right.

serviceSection.title: Service Order Details
serviceSection.createDescription: Choose the service item, price, and discount. Discounts are only for Retail/Service VIP customers.
serviceSection.editDescription: Update the service item, price, discount, and supporting details. Discounts are only for Retail/Service VIP customers.

vipSection.title: VIP Recharge Details
vipSection.createDescription: VIP recharge orders are recorded as 200 USD and open Retail/Service VIP after saving.
vipSection.editDescription: Update supporting details for this recharge order.

details.description: Review the full order amounts, exchange rates, related users, and linked form details.
details.title: Order Details

supplementary.empty: This order does not have related purchase, wholesale, service, or VIP recharge details yet.
supplementary.noMoreDetails: There are no additional details in the linked form yet.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account is not an admin and cannot access profile, privacy, or media reviews.

confirm.privacy: Are you sure you want to {action} this privacy review?
confirm.media: Are you sure you want to {action} this media review?
confirm.profile: Are you sure you want to {action} this profile change request?

feedback.profileApproved: Profile change approved and the user profile has been updated.

privacy.emptyDescription: There are no pending ID card or passport submissions right now. New submissions will appear here.

media.emptyDescription: There are no pending photos or videos right now. New media submissions will appear here.

task.emptyDescription: There are no task submissions waiting for review right now. New submissions will appear here after teammates submit their work.

profile.emptyDescription: There are no name or city change requests waiting for confirmation.

header.title: FX Rate Center
header.description: Review the latest effective currency pairs and their full history in one place so orders and finance see the same reference rates.

states.noManageDescription: The current signed-in account is not allowed to manage FX rate records.
states.noViewDescription: The current signed-in account is not allowed to view FX rate records.

sync.title: FX Settings
sync.description: Choose which currencies are fetched every day, or fetch several currencies for today right away.
sync.autoFetchEnabled: Enabled. The currencies below are fetched against CNY every day.
sync.autoFetchDisabled: Disabled. You can still fetch rates manually.
sync.pairsDescription: The target currency is fixed to CNY. Added currencies are included in the daily 09:30 fetch.
sync.manualDescription: Enter one or more currencies and fetch today's CNY rate immediately.

feedback.pairAdded: {currency} was added to the daily list.
feedback.pairRemoved: {currency} was removed from the daily list.

latest.title: Latest FX Rates
latest.description: Each currency pair keeps only its latest effective value, ordered by the most recent update time.
latest.emptyDescription: There are no FX rate records yet. New rates will appear here first.
latest.noMatchDescription: No latest FX rates match the current filters.

history.title: History
history.emptyDescription: There are no FX rate history records yet. New rates will appear here in reverse chronological order.
history.noMatchDescription: No history records match the current filters.

dialogs.currencyHint: Currency codes are automatically changed to uppercase when you save. For example, usd becomes USD.

create.title: Create FX Rate
create.description: After saving, a new history entry appears right away and the latest value for the pair is updated.

edit.title: Edit FX Rate
edit.description: Saving updates this history entry directly and also updates the latest value for the same currency pair.

feedback.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the FX rate record for {pairLabel}? This action cannot be undone.

validation.originalCurrencyRequired: Please enter the original currency code.
validation.targetCurrencyRequired: Please enter the target currency code.

errors.duplicateKey: This FX rate already exists. Please review it and try again.
errors.positiveRate: The FX rate value must be greater than 0.
errors.permission: The current account does not have permission to view or manage FX rate data.

states.noPermissionDescription: This account is not enabled yet or does not have access to a referral tree for this business.
states.emptyDescription: There are no referral relationships in your visible scope yet. New invitation signups will appear here automatically.
states.noMatchDescription: No referral relationships match the current search. Try a different name, email, or role.

tree.title: Referral Hierarchy
tree.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or role

sections.manager: Managers can view their own upstream and downstream relationships, plus the referral chains of each sales account in their team. Team sales members are marked separately in the tree.
sections.recruiter: Recruiters can see who referred them and which sales accounts they referred. The tree does not expand into unrelated team relationships.
sections.default: This view shows your direct upstream and downstream relationships in a tree hierarchy instead of separate lists.

errors.noPermission: The current account does not have permission to view the referral tree.

header.title: Commission Board
header.description: Review all commission records, pending settlement amounts, and payout progress in one place. Administrators and finance users can manually mark approved commissions as paid.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account cannot view the full commission board.

filters.title: Filter Commissions
filters.description: {records} records across {beneficiaries} beneficiaries match the current filters.
filters.keywordPlaceholder: Search order, user, email, or category

beneficiaries.title: Beneficiary Summary
beneficiaries.description: Click a beneficiary to focus the board on all commission records linked to that person.
beneficiaries.emptyDescription: No beneficiaries match the current filters.

table.title: Commission Details
table.description: Inspect each commission line by order, beneficiary, source relationship, and settlement history.
table.emptyDescription: No commission records match the current filters.

actions.confirmMarkOrderPaid: Mark the commission for order {orderNumber} as paid?
actions.confirmMarkTaskPaid: Mark the commission for task {taskName} as paid?

feedback.orderMarkedPaid: The commission for order {orderNumber} is now marked as paid.
feedback.taskMarkedPaid: The commission for task {taskName} is now marked as paid.

taskSection.title: Task Commission Records
taskSection.description: Approved and completed tasks enter pending settlement first. Administrators and finance users can mark them as paid after review.
taskSection.emptyDescription: There are no commission records generated from approved tasks yet.

settings.title: Commission Rules
settings.description: Manage order commission, referral commission, and VIP first-year reward rules here. Task rewards are still set from task types and task creation.

rulesSection.title: Commission Rules
rulesSection.description: New completed orders use the updated rules. Already paid records are not changed automatically.

ruleDescriptions.purchaseSalesmanTier: Created for the salesperson who entered a completed purchase order.
ruleDescriptions.purchaseReferral: Created for the referrer when a referred customer completes a purchase order.
ruleDescriptions.serviceEscortSalesman: Applies to tour escort orders and medical escort orders. Created for the salesperson after the order is completed.
ruleDescriptions.digitalSurvivalSalesman: Created for the salesperson after a digital survival service is completed.
ruleDescriptions.serviceReferral: Created for the referrer when a referred customer completes a service order.
ruleDescriptions.vipFirstYearReferralBonus: Created for the referrer when a referred customer opens the matching VIP for the first time.

calculations.purchaseSalesmanTier: Commission = min(purchase order RMB amount, {tier1Limit}) × {tier1Rate} + max(purchase order RMB amount - {tier1Limit}, 0) × {tier2Rate}
calculations.serviceEscortSalesman: Commission = cost amount + (service order RMB amount - cost amount) × {rate}
calculations.digitalSurvivalSalesman: Commission = max(service order RMB amount - cost amount, 0) × {rate}

errors.permission: This account cannot update commission rules.
errors.unknown: Commission rules could not be saved. Please try again later.

salesmanTaskSection.title: My Task Commissions
salesmanTaskSection.description: This section lists task commission records earned by the current account after task reviews are approved, including whether they are still pending settlement.
salesmanTaskSection.emptyDescription: This account does not have any commission records from approved tasks yet.

origin.referralPurchase: Generated from referred purchase order {orderNumber} for {customerLabel}.
origin.referralService: Generated from referred service order {orderNumber} for {customerLabel}.
origin.referralVipFirstYearBonus: Generated from referred VIP first-year order {orderNumber} for {customerLabel}.

errors.noAdminAccess: The current account cannot view the full commission board.
errors.noSalesmanAccess: The current account cannot view personal commission records.

header.title: Salesman Commission History
header.description: Review your own commission totals, pending settlement progress, and the order or task sources behind each payout.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account cannot view personal commission records.
states.emptyDescription: This account does not have commission records yet.

table.title: Commission History
table.description: Each record shows where the commission came from, which order generated it, and whether it is still pending or already settled.

admin.taskNameBlank: The task name cannot be empty.
admin.teamRequired: A team task must be linked to a specific team.
admin.taskTypeRequired: Please choose a valid task type.
admin.targetRolesRequired: Choose at least one target role.
admin.targetRolesLocked: This task has already been accepted, so target roles cannot be changed right now.
admin.commissionAmountInvalid: The commission amount can be left blank. If filled, it must be a number that is 0 or above.
admin.acceptanceLimitInvalid: Enter a whole number above 0, or choose unlimited accepts.
admin.acceptanceLimitBelowAccepted: The accept limit cannot be lower than the number already accepted.
admin.authExpired: Your sign-in has expired. Sign in again and try once more.
admin.noPermission: This account cannot perform this action.
admin.taskNotFound: The task no longer exists. Refresh the task list and try again.
admin.taskCompletedReadOnly: Only administrators can edit or delete completed tasks.
admin.duplicateAttachmentPath: An attachment path conflict was detected. Upload the file again.
admin.attachmentCountExceeded: Too many attachments were selected. Upload at most 10 files.
admin.attachmentEmpty: An empty file was detected. Attachments must be larger than 0 bytes.
admin.attachmentTooLarge: At least one attachment is too large. Images must stay below 5 MB, videos must stay below 30 MB, and other files must stay within 20 MB.
admin.attachmentTotalTooLarge: The attachments are too large altogether. Keep the total within 100 MB.
admin.attachmentTypeNotAllowed: An unsupported attachment type was detected. Upload common document, image, media, or archive formats.
admin.storage: Task attachment processing failed. Please try again later.

salesman.cannotAccept: You cannot accept this task right now.
salesman.alreadyAccepted: This task was just accepted by someone else. Refresh to see the latest status.
salesman.alreadyAcceptedByMe: You have already accepted this task. Continue from your own task progress.
salesman.acceptanceFull: This task has no accepts left.
salesman.cannotComplete: You cannot complete this task right now.
salesman.notAccepted: This task cannot be marked as completed yet.
salesman.cannotCreateReviewSubmission: You cannot create a review submission for this task right now.
salesman.cannotSubmitReview: You cannot submit this task for review right now.
salesman.reviewAssetsRequired: Upload at least one submission file before sending the task for review.
salesman.reviewSubmissionMissing: The review submission draft is missing. Reopen the dialog and try again.
salesman.reviewSubmissionInvalid: The current review submission draft is no longer valid. Reopen the dialog and try again.
salesman.reviewFilesRequired: Please choose at least one submission file.
salesman.reviewAttachmentCountExceeded: Too many submission files were selected. Upload at most 10 files.
salesman.reviewAttachmentEmpty: An empty submission file was detected. Each file must be larger than 0 bytes.
salesman.reviewAttachmentTooLarge: At least one submission file is too large. Images must stay below 5 MB, videos must stay below 30 MB, and other files must stay within 20 MB.
salesman.reviewAttachmentTotalTooLarge: The submission files are too large altogether. Keep the total within 100 MB.
salesman.reviewAttachmentTypeNotAllowed: An unsupported submission file type was detected. Upload common document, image, media, or archive formats.
salesman.inactive: This account is not enabled yet and cannot process tasks right now.

feedback.createdWithAttachments: The task and attachments have been created.
feedback.updatedWithCommissionSyncWarning: The task was updated, but the related commission information has not fully refreshed yet. Check the commission board again later.
feedback.deletedWithAttachmentCleanupWarning: The task was deleted, but some task or review files have not been fully cleared yet. Check again later.

admin.confirmDelete: Delete task "{taskName}"? Attached files will be removed as well.
admin.confirmDeleteWithHistory: Delete task "{taskName}"? Related review or commission records, task files, and review submission files will be removed as well.

header.title: Administrator Task Board
header.description: Review progress in one place, publish new tasks, and adjust target roles before work begins.

reviewBoard.title: Task Review
reviewBoard.description: Review submitted task work here. Approved tasks move to completed, and rejected submissions can be sent again.
reviewBoard.noPermissionDescription: The current account cannot review task submissions. Confirm the account role and status.
reviewBoard.confirm: Are you sure you want to {action} this task submission?
reviewBoard.rejectReasonPrompt: Enter a rejection reason. Leave blank if no reason is needed.

feedback.approved: Task review approved. The task is now completed.
feedback.rejected: Task review rejected. The submitter can send it again.

errors.noPermission: The current account cannot review this task submission.
errors.notReviewing: This task is no longer waiting for review.
errors.submissionMissing: The current task submission is missing. Refresh and try again.
errors.taskMissing: The task no longer exists. Refresh the list and try again.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account is not an administrator and cannot open the task dispatch board.
states.emptyDescription: No tasks match the current filters. Adjust the filters or create a new task first.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by task name, creator, target role, or assignee

list.title: Task List
list.description: Matched {count} tasks. Use search and filters to find the right item quickly.

createDialog.title: Create Task
createDialog.description: Choose target roles and how many people can accept the task. Matching internal members can see it. Attachments will be saved together with the task.
createDialog.taskNamePlaceholder: For example: Follow up this week's client callback materials
createDialog.targetRolesHint: Multiple roles can be selected. After acceptance, the task belongs to the teammate who accepted it.
createDialog.commissionAmountPlaceholder: Leave blank if there is no reward; for example: 80
createDialog.acceptanceHint: Different members can accept the same task, submit their own work, and receive their own reward after approval.
createDialog.reviewRequiresAttachmentHint: When this is on, the submitter must upload at least one file before review.
createDialog.reviewNoteOnlyHint: When this is off, the submitter can send the task for review with a note, and may still add files.
createDialog.taskTypeHint: The task type controls how the task is categorized and how related commissions are displayed. More types will be added later.
createDialog.taskIntroPlaceholder: Add the background, goals, execution requirements, and any notes for this task.
createDialog.attachmentsCta: Click to choose attachments. You can upload multiple files at once.
createDialog.attachmentsHint: Files are saved in the task attachment area and automatically linked to this task. Limit: {maxFiles} files, images below {imageMaxPerFile}, videos below {videoMaxPerFile}, other files within {otherMaxPerFile}, and {maxTotal} total.
createDialog.noAttachments: No attachments selected yet. You can create the task with attachments in one step.

editDialog.title: Edit Task
editDialog.description: Update the published task details here. Once the task has been accepted, target roles stay locked, but the task content can still be adjusted.
editDialog.targetRolesLockedHint: This task has already been accepted, so target roles can no longer be changed here.
editDialog.attachmentsLocked: Attachments stay unchanged in edit mode. If attachments need to change, recreate the task for now.
editDialog.noAttachments: This task currently has no attachments.

assignmentDialog.title: Adjust Task Assignment
assignmentDialog.description: Once the task has been accepted, this dialog becomes view-only. Finish target role changes before acceptance.
assignmentDialog.viewOnlyNotice: This task is already in progress or completed. It is view-only right now.

card.assigneeListEmpty: No one has accepted this task yet.
card.completedLockedNotice: Only administrators can edit or delete completed tasks.

submissionMedia.title: Member Submission Media
submissionMedia.description: Shows approved image and video deliverables from members, with preview and original-file download.
submissionMedia.empty: This completed task has no previewable image or video deliverables yet.
submissionMedia.loadFailed: Submitted media could not be loaded. Refresh and try again.
submissionMedia.openFailed: The preview link could not be generated. Try again later.
submissionMedia.downloadFailed: The download link could not be generated. Try again later.

filePreview.title: File Preview
filePreview.unsupportedTitle: This file cannot be previewed here yet
filePreview.unsupportedDescription: Download the original file and open it with the matching app on your computer.

mediaLibrary.title: Task Media Library
mediaLibrary.description: Manage member files that have passed task review in one place. {count} file(s) are available.
mediaLibrary.searchPlaceholder: Search by file name, task, submitter, or reviewer
mediaLibrary.noPermissionDescription: The current account cannot view the task media library. Confirm the account role and status.
mediaLibrary.emptyTitle: No Files in Task Media Library
mediaLibrary.emptyDescription: Files will appear here after member submissions pass task review.
mediaLibrary.noMatchesDescription: Try another keyword or switch the file type.
mediaLibrary.previewFailed: The preview link could not be generated. Try again later.
mediaLibrary.downloadFailed: The file could not be downloaded. Try again later.

dialog.title: Task Type Management
dialog.description: Maintain task type names, descriptions, and default commissions. New tasks only show active types.

list.title: Existing Types
list.empty: No task types yet. Add one on the right first.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe which tasks this type fits.

validation.commissionRequired: Enter a default commission that is 0 or above.

validation.taskNameRequired: Please enter a task name first.
validation.commissionAmountInvalid: Leave commission blank when there is no reward, or enter a number that is 0 or above.
validation.acceptanceLimitInvalid: Enter a whole number above 0, or choose unlimited accepts.
validation.targetRolesRequiredForCreate: Choose at least one target role.
validation.targetRolesRequiredForAssignment: Choose at least one target role.

feedback.accepted: Task accepted. You can start working on it now.

header.title: Task Center
header.description: Review the tasks you can participate in, track what you are currently handling, and submit your completed work for review.

states.noPermissionDescription: This account cannot open the task center right now. Confirm the account role and status.
states.emptyDescription: No tasks match the current filters right now. Check back again later.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search task name, details, or target role

card.fullyAccepted: This task has no accepts left right now.
card.takenByOthers: This task is already being handled by another teammate.
card.reviewingByMe: Your submission is waiting for administrator review.
card.reviewingByOthers: Another teammate has already submitted this task for review.
card.rejectedByOthers: This task was rejected for another teammate and is waiting for their resubmission.

submitDialog.title: Submit Task Review
submitDialog.description: Upload the completion files for "{taskName}". After submission, the task will move into the administrator review queue.
submitDialog.descriptionNoteOnly: Add a note for "{taskName}". After submission, the task will move into the administrator review queue.
submitDialog.notePlaceholder: Add a short note for the reviewer, such as what was delivered or any points worth checking.
submitDialog.filesHint: You can upload up to {maxFiles} files. Images must stay below {imageMaxPerFile}, videos must stay below {videoMaxPerFile}, other files must stay within {otherMaxPerFile}, and the total must stay within {maxTotal}.
submitDialog.filesOptionalHint: This task can be submitted with a note only. If you add files, you can upload up to {maxFiles}; images must stay below {imageMaxPerFile}, videos below {videoMaxPerFile}, other files within {otherMaxPerFile}, and the total within {maxTotal}.
submitDialog.filesOptionalEmpty: Files are not required for this task. Add a note to submit it for review.

header.title: Operation Records
header.description: Review account changes, profile approvals, and feedback handling in one place so administrators can see who handled what and when.

states.noPermissionDescription: Only active administrator accounts can view operation records.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search people, email, action detail, or source page

list.title: Recent Operations
list.description: This first version summarizes existing tracked actions. Orders, commissions, teams, and announcements can be connected next.
list.emptyDescription: Account changes, profile reviews, and feedback handling will appear here.

dialog.title: Note for {name}
dialog.description: This note is only shown to you, so you can remember follow-up details.
dialog.visibility: Only you can see this note. Other accounts will not see it.
dialog.placeholder: Add useful details, such as preferences, follow-up points, or reminders

errors.forbidden: This account cannot save this note.
errors.invalidInput: This note is too long. Shorten it before saving.
errors.notFound: This account could not be found.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The note could not be saved. Please try again later.
errors.unknown: The note could not be saved. Please try again later.

header.title: Account Management
header.description: Review system sign-in accounts and adjust account role, status, and city. Business profiles are managed inside each business area.

states.noPermissionDescription: Only active administrator accounts can review and adjust system accounts.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search name, phone, email, city, or team

directory.title: Accounts
directory.description: The list keeps account, role, status, city, and note visible. Open an account to review basic details; tourism and wholesale customer profiles are managed in their own business areas.
directory.emptyDescription: Adjust the search text or filters and try again.

logs.title: Recent Adjustments
logs.description: Recent administrator changes to account role, status, and city are recorded here for later review.
logs.emptyDescription: Records will appear here after an administrator adjusts an account.

dialog.title: Account Details: {name}
dialog.description: Basic sign-in account details are shown here. You can adjust role, status, and city below.
dialog.adjustDescription: After saving, the updated account information applies after the person signs in again or refreshes the page.
dialog.cityPlaceholder: Enter a city, or leave it blank
dialog.notePlaceholder: Add a reason so the change is easy to review later

feedback.saved: Account information saved. The person will see the updated role, status, and details after the next sign-in or page refresh.
feedback.vipApproved: VIP request approved and the VIP recharge order has been created.

errors.forbidden: The current account cannot adjust people accounts.
errors.invalidInput: Choose a valid role, account status, and city.
errors.lastAdmin: The system must keep at least one active administrator account.
errors.noChange: The account role, status, and city did not change.
errors.notFound: The person account could not be found.
errors.selfChange: You cannot adjust your own account information here.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The account adjustment could not be saved. Please try again later.
errors.unknown: The account adjustment could not be saved. Please try again later.
errors.processed: This VIP request has already been handled.

header.title: Customer Management
header.description: Review your customers and mark them as retail for internal use.
header.descriptionRetailOnly: Review your customers and mark them as retail for internal use.

states.noPermissionDescription: Only active accounts with business access can review and mark their own customers.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search name, phone, email, or city

directory.title: My Customers
directory.description: Customer marks are for internal management only and are not shown to customers.
directory.emptyDescription: Adjust the search text, or confirm that customers are already linked to you.

dialog.title: Adjust {name}
dialog.description: Customer marks are only used internally and are not shown to customers.

feedback.vipRequested: VIP request submitted. It will take effect after admin payment confirmation.

errors.forbidden: The current account cannot mark customers.
errors.notFound: The customer could not be found.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The customer mark could not be saved. Please try again later.

header.title: Team Management
header.manageableHint: The current team supports direct updates to its name and members.

descriptions.manager: Managers can maintain their own team profile, members, and client structure. The panel summarizes the current team information and referral relationships automatically.
descriptions.administrator: Administrators can inspect every team, create and delete teams directly, adjust members, and reassign the team manager.
descriptions.salesman: Salesmen can review the currently visible team structure, including members, accumulated clients, and the responsible manager.
descriptions.readOnly: This page shows the visible team structure based on access permissions so operations and finance can inspect members and client accumulation together.
descriptions.fallback: This panel brings team details, members, and client referral relationships together in a single management view.

feedback.createdAndContinue: The team has been created. You can continue by adding salesman members next.
feedback.created: A new team has been created.
feedback.memberAdded: The team member has been added.
feedback.memberRemoved: The team member has been removed.

TeamManagement.confirmDelete: Delete team "{teamName}"? This will remove the team and clear those member assignments.

adminCreate.title: Create Team
adminCreate.description: Administrators can create teams directly and assign a manager during creation. Managers not occupied by other teams are prioritized as assignable.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account cannot open the team page right now. This page shows different team information depending on role and account status.
states.noTeamDataDescription: There is no visible team data yet. Once team relationships are established, an overview will appear here automatically.

managerSetup.title: Create Your Team Workspace
managerSetup.description: You have not created a team yet. Create the team first and then continue adding salesmen.
managerSetup.emptyTitle: Team Data Has Not Been Set Up Yet
managerSetup.emptyDescription: Once the team is created, this area will start showing members, team clients, and assignable salesman candidates.

overview.title: Team Overview
overview.description: Select a team first to inspect member details and the client structure. Managers default to the team they can manage.

insights.title: Team Overview
insights.description: This summarizes team clients by referral relationships so you can judge the current team structure quickly.
insights.activeEmptyDescription: There are no active salesmen in the current team yet. Add members first.
insights.activeReadyDescription: The current team already has a baseline member structure and can continue toward client conversion.
insights.vipEmptyDescription: There are no VIP clients yet. This number will grow automatically once team clients become VIPs.
insights.vipReadyDescription: Some clients are already VIPs, so you can continue following up alongside orders and commissions.
insights.relationsDescription: The selected team currently accumulates {count} visible client referral relationships.

members.title: Team Members
members.description: This section lists the salesmen in the team. Each member card also shows the number of direct clients.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search by member name, email, or client status
members.emptyDescription: No team members match the current search.

candidates.title: Available Salesmen
candidates.description: This list shows sales team members who can be added to a team. Anyone already assigned to another team stays marked and cannot be added twice.
candidates.searchPlaceholder: Search salesman name, email, or current team
candidates.availableCount: There are currently {count} salesman candidates who can be added directly.
candidates.emptyDescription: No salesman candidates match the current search.
candidates.readOnlyDescription: This role can inspect team structure here, but member changes are not available.

clients.title: Team Clients
clients.description: This section groups team clients by the salespeople who referred them and also shows VIP labels.
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search client name, email, or referring salesman
clients.emptyDescription: No team clients match the current search.

errors.missingTeamId: The team was saved, but the result did not come back correctly. Please try again.
errors.teamProfileMissing: Create the team first, then continue adding members.
errors.teamNotVisible: The selected team cannot be viewed right now. The system has already tried to reload it.
errors.salesmanNotAssignable: This salesman cannot join the team right now and may already belong to another team.
errors.managerNotAssignable: This manager cannot be assigned to the team right now and may already be responsible for another team.
errors.cannotManageTeam: The current account cannot manage team details right now.
errors.cannotManageMembers: The current account cannot adjust team members right now.
errors.cannotDeleteTeam: The current account cannot delete the team right now.
errors.teamNotFound: The target team no longer exists and may have been modified by someone else.
